title: AIOS Recyclable Glasses Party Box Set 180 Piece. Pints (50) Softdrinks, Long Drinks, Half Pints (30), Wine (30), Champagne (20) and Shots (50)
features: Contains the most popular glass styles for parties, events and gatherings
All glass styles are recyclable for disposal or can be reused if washed out carefully
Box contains 50 pints, 30 softdrink / half-pint glasses, 30 wine glasses, 20 champagne flutes and 50 shots glasses
Packed in a compact cardboard box for easy transprtation

The box contains an assortment of glasses, including champagne flutes, wine glasses, highball glasses, and tumblers. This variety ensures that guests can enjoy a wide range of beverages, from sparkling wines and cocktails to juices and soft drinks.

These disposable glasses are made from high-quality, sturdy plastic that mimics the look of real glass. They offer the elegance of glassware without the risk of breakage, making them perfect for outdoor events and settings where safety is a concern.

They come pre-assembled and ready to use, eliminating the need for washing, transporting, or worrying about fragile glassware. After the event, simply gather them for easy cleanup, saving both time and effort.

The mixed box offers glasses with varying capacities to accommodate different drink sizes and styles. Whether it's a celebratory toast with champagne or a refreshing soda, there's a suitable glass for every occasion.

Buying these disposable glasses in a mixed box is often more cost-effective than purchasing individual sets of different glass types. It's an economical choice for larger gatherings where a variety of drinks will be served.

Overall, the mixed box of plastic disposable glasses is an ideal solution for hosts who want to offer an array of drink options while maintaining a high standard of presentation and convenience. Its combination of style, variety, and practicality makes it a popular choice for parties, events, and gatherings of all sizes.

Hassle-free recyclable glasses eliminate the risk of accidents related to glass breakage. Parties can get lively, and traditional glassware can be easily broken. Reduce the time spent on post-party cleanup, allowing you to enjoy the event with less stress. All the types of glasses you need for large gatherings in various shapes, sizes, and designs to suit different types of beverages, from soft drinks and water to beer, fiz, cocktails and wine.
